sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Keima kong biak Pasian, A vaanglian Pasian
Ngaihsut zawh loh in vaangliatna tawh dim hi.
Sim zawh loh aksi-te, pha zah ding seha,
Tua van aksi-te a min ciatin sam hi.
Keima phatra lel tawh Topa lungkim hi,
Keima biakna lel te Topa'n hong saang hi,
Kei ka ginat loh hang Topa vaanglian hi;
Ka biak Pasian hangin ka lungdam ding hi.
Eite biak Pasian in a nungta Pasian,
Sing leh suang Pasian a si Pasian hilo;
Amah nungta aih man, kei ka nungta hi,
Ka Topa a ding kei ka nungta ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pasian ngaihsut tham ding, Mi?n bang hi le hiam?
Ahong phawk tham ding mi in bang hi le hiam?
A Tapa khat neihsun hong pia ka Pasian,
Hong itna vantung pan leitung hong tuaksuk.
